steps.title: Use the known point to find the coefficient
steps.content:
The model is $y=800ax^2$, and the graph contains the point $(3.25,10140)$. Substitute the point:
$$10140=800a(3.25)^2.$$

steps.title: Solve and evaluate
steps.content: Since $\left(800\right)(3.25)^2=8450$, $$a=\frac{10140}{8450}=1.2.$$ Then $800a=960$, so at $x=7.25$: $$y=960(7.25)^2=50{,}460.$$ The answer is 50460. The requested response box wants the numerical value only, so enter 50460 without a comma.
